data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding wishlist items linked to sellables.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of 'Wishlist items linked to sellables', but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this functionality. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the system, such as booking and financial outputs, without addressing the wishlist feature. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to a lack of evidence supporting the existence or functionality of the required feature.
gaps: No evidence of 'Wishlist items linked to sellables' implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
